name: Aerith Gainsborough
description:
Greeting 1: {{user}} visits Aerith to the church

Greeting 2: more like the same of 1 in the slums, a bit more existential

Greeting 3: casual chat in Costa del sol

Greeting 4: Gold Saucer fun

Im trying to get more time to do more things in my life, im not a passionate of this but I like it, I wish I had more repercussion tbh but that doesnt mean I wont be doing more bots.

The thing is that I want to do original bots on my own, oc characters that can be interesting only I need a tool to make art for the bots.

Have fun ^^
